rationale: For a dense real estate property management dashboard, clarity, authority, and data legibility are paramount. A Swiss High-Contrast archetype ensures maximum readability for complex data matrices (like the EMI tracker) and allows the user's custom brand colors to serve as functional accents rather than decorative noise.

rules: Headings must use Outfit for a clean, architectural real estate feel.
Financial data (amounts, dates, matrix cells) MUST use JetBrains Mono to align numbers perfectly.
Never center-align data tables; always left-align strings, right-align numbers.
Ensure hierarchy jump between headings doesn't exceed 2 tailwind steps.

colors.theming_strategy: The primary accent color must be a CSS variable (--primary) configurable via the Brand Settings Panel. The base UI must remain strictly monochrome (White, 10% Grey) to ensure the custom brand color always contrasts well. Dynamic brand color should be injected into the Shadcn config variables.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, utilizing generous p-6 to p-8 padding for all primary container cards, but dense gap-4 for data matrices to ensure high density scanning.
rules: Use BENTO grids for dashboard metrics (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4).
All dashboard widgets must use h-full to align heights.
Data matrix (month/customer) must be strictly tabular, utilizing overflow-x-auto for horizontal scrolling.
Cards: 1px subtle border (border-neutral-200), no drop-shadows by default. Hover adds slight shadow-sm.

components.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-neutral-200), rounded-lg. No glassmorphism, completely solid to avoid data refraction.
components.tables: Shadcn Table heavily customized. Sticky header (bg-neutral-50), subtle hover on rows (hover:bg-neutral-50/50). Tabular data padding should be dense (py-2 px-3).
components.buttons: Shadcn Button. Primary buttons use the dynamic brand color. Secondary are outline with text-foreground. Include specific data-testid on every button.
components.inputs: Shadcn Input/Select. Focus state must use ring-2 with the primary brand color.
components.badges: For payment status: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 (Paid), bg-rose-100 text-rose-800 (Overdue), bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 (Partial), bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 (Pending). Rounded-full, px-2.5 py-0.5, text-xs font-medium.
components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight for high-end feel, Regular for dense tables).

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Tables rows darken slightly. Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-[1px]).
motion_and_interaction.loading: Use clean, monochrome skeleton loaders (Shadcn Skeleton). Avoid spinners where possible for a more structural feel.
motion_and_interaction.modals: Slide-in drawers from the right (Shadcn Sheet) are preferred over center modals for payment recording, to keep context of the matrix grid visible.

key_views_instructions.dashboard_home: Bento grid for top stats (Collections, Overdue, Active, Penalty). Area chart (Recharts) for collection trends over time. List of recent overdue items below.
key_views_instructions.payment_tracker_matrix: Complex dense table. Rows: Customers/Properties. Columns: Months (Jan, Feb, etc.). Cells contain Payment Badges. Clicking a cell opens a Sheet to record full/partial payment or waive penalty.
key_views_instructions.customer_profile: Split view: Left narrow column for profile details (photo, contact, property info, active EMI), Right wide column for tabbed content: Full Payment History and WhatsApp Message Logs.
key_views_instructions.brand_settings: Simple form with Shadcn Color Picker (or text input for HEX), Tagline input, and Logo upload drag-and-drop zone. Shows a live preview card of how the brand looks.
key_views_instructions.whatsapp_center: Split pane: Left side list of target customers (filtered by overdue/pending/reminders), Right side message preview/composer and Bulk Send CTA.

images.description: Abstract Swiss architectural geometric background for the login page.
Default geometric logo for the brand settings preview before the user uploads their own.
Professional male headshot for customer profile placeholder.
Professional female headshot for customer profile placeholder.

testing.rules: All interactive elements, forms, matrix cells, and nav links MUST include a `data-testid` attribute formatted as kebab-case role-based names (e.g., `data-testid="payment-matrix-cell-january"`).
